payload.answer: This is a read-only inspection request for memory id mem_123. I cannot show the memory contents because the underlying record is not included in the provided input.

entity_resolution.reason: The request targets an existing memory by id, but no stored record or inspection payload for mem_123 was provided in the fixture.

details: No durable memory was created or modified.
Inspection could not be completed because no record data for mem_123 was available.

repair_options: Provide the stored contents or metadata for mem_123 so it can be inspected.
Run the inspect command against a live Brain store and return the record payload.
If mem_123 may be missing or deleted, verify whether the id exists before inspecting it.
